---
name: Research or Structure Update
about: Propose a research edit, structural rewrite, or new evidence-backed addition.
title: "[research]: "
labels: ["research"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed change in one short paragraph.

## Why It Matters

Explain what becomes more accurate, more falsifiable, or easier to verify.

## Affected Files or Sections

- `markdown/en/...`
- `markdown/zh-TW/...`
- `latex/main.tex`
- `latex/references.bib`

## Evidence or Source Material

List the DOI, URL, arXiv identifier, or other material that supports the change.

## Verification Plan

Describe how the claim or citation should be checked.

## Translation Impact

State whether both the English and `zh-TW` documents will need updates.
